searchKey: FROM={{fedora:27}}.RUN={{set -uex &&     dnf config-manager --add-repo https://download.docker.com/linux/fedora/docker-ce.repo &&     sed -i 's/\$releasever/26/g' /etc/yum.repos.d/docker-ce.repo &&     dnf install -vy docker-ce}}
expectedValue: After installing a package with dnf, command 'dnf clean all' should run.
actualValue: Command `dnf clean all` is not being run after installing packages.
